hero.heading: Selected Engagements.
hero.description: A record of infrastructure deployments and operational systems delivered across global markets under demanding conditions.

projects.title: NORWAY COMMERCIAL BANK
projects.description: Critical data infrastructure rebuilt within a renewable energy framework. High-availability architecture integrated directly into a wind farm power grid — carbon-neutral operational footprint, zero compromise on uptime.

projects.title: ARCTIC OVERHAUL
projects.description: Full data centre restoration executed remotely under 2020 pandemic isolation protocols. Complete infrastructure recovery achieved within 72 hours of initial engagement, without on-site personnel.

projects.title: DOHA MARITIME CENTER
projects.description: Purpose-built coastal data facility designed for peak-load event processing under extreme thermal conditions. Seawater cooling system integrated. Delivered on schedule to strict operational specifications.

projects.title: TOYOTA DATA PLANT
projects.description: Hyper-redundant power architecture engineered for uninterrupted manufacturing continuity. Assembly line operations protected from power system variance across all production stages.
